description_long: This is a large, industrial-style metal dumpster with a weathered, rusted exterior and a rectangular shape. The dumpster features a split, hinged lid made of metal, with one side partially open to reveal various discarded items such as cardboard boxes and debris inside. The surface is mottled with patches of rust, green oxidation, and grime, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The sides are reinforced with vertical ridges for structural strength, and there is a rectangular mail-slot-like feature on the front. The interior is spacious and filled with refuse, suggesting it is used for bulk waste collection. No wheels or handles are visible, and there are no discernible warning labels or signage on the exterior.
description: A large, weathered metal dumpster with a split, hinged lid and visible rust patches, partially filled with cardboard and debris.
description_view_0: Side view showing the partially open split lid and visible cardboard boxes protruding from the top.
description_view_1: Front view with the lid fully open, exposing the interior filled with refuse and a rectangular slot feature on the front panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the other half of the split lid open and more debris visible inside.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the closed, rusted lid and the plain, reinforced back panel.
attribute_lid_type: split, hinged, flat metal lid with two sections; no visible locking or opening mechanisms
